comparison_contract.architecture: Pluggable, LPO, NPO, CPO, optical I/O and coherent transport can coexist.
comparison_contract.capacity: Wafer diameter, floor area, fibre-km, unit output, revenue capacity and jobs use different denominators.
comparison_contract.commercial: Partnership, sample, qualification, order, commitment, shipment and recognized revenue remain separate.
comparison_contract.customer: Product or ecosystem exposure is not customer-specific revenue without named primary evidence.
comparison_contract.duplication: Acquired businesses are represented under their current parent rather than double-counted.
comparison_contract.financial: Preserve currency, period and accounting boundary; group revenue is not optical-only revenue.
